fields.name: source_data_files_v0.zip
fields.description:
This is a temporary archive of an older version of the source data files:

-ALL_YEAR_MASTER_SUBJECT_SAMPLE_LIST_DRC.txt

- 2a_dbGaP_SubjectPhenotypesDS cumulative_8.23.18.xlsx       

- 3a_dbGaP_SubjectAttributesDS cumulative_8.23.18.xlsx

- 4a_dbGaP_SubjectDS cumulative_8.23.18.xlsx                                      

- 5a_dbGaP_SubjectSampleMappingDS cumulative_8.23.18.xlsx                         

- 6a_dbGaP_PedigreeDS cumulative_8.23.18.xlsx

- FY 2017 Kids First Minimal Clinical2FPhenotype Data Elements_cumc cdh 7-18.xlsx

- chung_broad_5_2_19_sample.tsv

The following changes were made to yield the new set of files. 

- 60 participants were removed from the FY17 spreadsheet because they do not appear in the master subject sample list for this study. 

- 24 participants were removed from each of the dbGaP files because these participants do not appear in the master subject sample list for this study.
